name: CONTRACT-BUG-3
title: check-naming.py enforces wrong legacy prefix (rwf- instead of rbt-)
description: scripts/enforcement/check-naming.py lines 76-85 scan for files beginning with 'rwf-' as a legacy banned prefix, and the violation message at line 84 says: 'legacy rwf- prefix banned (use rabbit- or no prefix)'. But spec invariant 13 states the banned legacy prefix is 'rbt-' (not 'rwf-'). The script fails to enforce the documented invariant; rbt- prefixed files would slip through and rwf- files (likely never used) would be flagged. test-check-naming-no-rbt.py only verifies the script TEXT does not contain 'rbt-' literally - it does not verify the script CHECKS for 'rbt-'. Fix: change the literal from 'rwf-' to 'rbt-' and update the violation message accordingly.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3 batch 1: validate-feature.py run.py path; check-naming.py rbt- prefix; module docstrings; runner invokes all tests; dead tests deleted.
